case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. VELVA CARNER et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT --- ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF SERVED FEB-28-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARNER, VELVA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CARNER, VELVA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT CARNER, VELVA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
